title: malaxis quadrata
intro: Malaxis quadrata, also known as the square orchid or small yellow lady's tresses, is a type of perennial orchid native to North America, characterized by its delicate yellow flowers and quadrangular rhizome. Traditionally, Malaxis quadrata has been used in herbal medicine, exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with Malaxis quadrata include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. Malaxis quadrata can be prepared as a tincture or infusion, often mixed with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and provide a natural treatment for various health conditions.
